traits.name: Delightful Light {@recharge 5} (bonus)
traits.text: The dolphin magically emanates light in a 10-foot radius for a moment. The dolphin and each creature of its choice in that light gain 11 (2d10) temporary hit points.

traits.name: Fey Leap (bonus)
traits.text: The dolphin teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Immediately before teleporting, the dolphin can choose one creature within 5 feet of it. That creature can teleport with the dolphin, appearing in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the dolphin's destination space.

traits.name: Hold Breath
traits.text: The dolphin can hold its breath for 20 minutes.
